title: Requestform
content: Request Transcript For getting Transcript and any other documents, download the detailed instructions Read More Download Request Degree Dear Alumni, You may collect your degree in person or through postal. For the detail, download the attached file. Read More Download Apply for Accommodation For Accommodation: Kindly forward your advance application and intimation to JUIT Alumni Cell by filling out this form. At least 96 hours (4 days) excluding holidays in advance. Your request can only be addressed when we receive your request at least 96 hrs. (4 days) excluding holidays in advance. We shall confirm availability or otherwise 24 hrs. before the date of Arrival. Read More Request Alumni ID Card Alumni Cell is planning to issue a Membership ID card. If you want to get your Alumni ID card. Please fill the form. Read More Please select from choose form for request of Transcript, Degree, Alumni ID card or Apply for Accommodation. <
